sections.biography-source-undefined: Liu Hong, styled Zigao, was from Anzhong county, Nanyang commandery. He served as Minister of the Household before he was elevated to Excellency of Works in the eighth lunar month of 188. In the eighth lunar month of 189, an imperial order removed Liu Hong as Excellency of Works in favor of Dong Zhuo.[HHS8] Supposedly, Liu Hong was removed because of natural disasters, for it was not raining for three months,[SGZ6] but it was claimed that Dong Zhuo forged the order with that accusation to become Excellency of Works himself.[HHS66] Regardless, it is unknown what happened to Liu Hong thereafter.

full_text:
Liu Hong (Zigao) 劉弘 (子高)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Hong (劉弘), styledZigao (子高), was born in Nanyang. Excellency of Works; dismissed by Emperor Shao in favor of Dong Zhuo. Liu Hong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.

BiographySource Undefined
Liu Hong, styled Zigao, was from Anzhong county, Nanyang commandery. He served as Minister of the Household before he was elevated to Excellency of Works in the eighth lunar month of 188. In the eighth lunar month of 189, an imperial order removed Liu Hong as Excellency of Works in favor of Dong Zhuo.[HHS8] Supposedly, Liu Hong was removed because of natural disasters, for it was not raining for three months,[SGZ6] but it was claimed that Dong Zhuo forged the order with that accusation to become Excellency of Works himself.[HHS66] Regardless, it is unknown what happened to Liu Hong thereafter.
